2026-04-16T23:04:23.394+01:00 WARN 39836 --- [enrollment-service] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-04-16T23:04:24.196+01:00 INFO 39836 --- [enrollment-service] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists enrollments cascade Hibernate: create table enrollments ( progress_percent numeric(5,2), activated_at timestamp(6), cancelled_at timestamp(6), certificate_id bigint, completed_at timestamp(6), course_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, enrolled_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, last_accessed_at timestamp(6), student_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, status varchar(20) not null check (status in ('PENDING','AWAITING_PAYMENT','ACTIVE','COMPLETED','CANCELLED','EXPIRED')), course_title varchar(200), primary key (id), constraint uk_enrollments_student_course unique (student_id, course_id) ) Hibernate: create index idx_enrollments_student_id on enrollments (student_id) Hibernate: create index idx_enrollments_course_id on enrollments (course_id) Hibernate: create index idx_enrollments_status on enrollments (status) 2026-04-16T23:04:24.245+01:00 INFO 39836 --- [enrollment-service] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-04-16T23:04:24.704+01:00 INFO 39836 --- [enrollment-service] [ main] c.e.enrollment.EnrollmentServiceTest : Started EnrollmentServiceTest in 2.448 seconds (process running for 7.118) 2026-04-16T23:04:24.729+01:00 WARN 39836 --- [enrollment-service] [ main] c.e.e.m.ServiceBusEventPublisher : Azure Service Bus connection string not configured. Events will be logged but not published.
